arts.ttl: Brest boss wary of facing ‘wounded animal’ Barca
arts.sum: The French side are unbeaten in the Champions League so far which Roy says has taken all the pressure off his players ahead of their trip to Montjuic. Brest boss Eric Roy has previewed his team’s Champions League clash against Barcelona and says his team have nothing to lose.

arts.sum: The game between Barcelona - Brest will be played on Tuesday November 26, at Estadi de Montjuïc with kick off at 3:00 p.m. ET /12:00 p.m. PT. Barcelona is in great form right now, having won three of their last four Champions League matches.

arts.ttl: Inigo sends warning to Barca ahead of UCL tie with Brest
arts.sum: Barca come into the match after a disappointing draw with Celta last time out, which Martinez admits he found hard to take, and has urged his team-mates not to relax against Brest. Inigo Martinez has warned his Barcelona team-mates they can’t afford to relax against French side Brest in the Champions League on Tuesday.
